detailed_description: This video captures a male surgeon meticulously performing a surgical hand and forearm scrub. Dressed in blue scrubs, a surgical cap, and a mask, he stands at a stainless steel scrub sink, using water and an orange antiseptic solution to thoroughly clean his hands and arms. The footage highlights the detailed and professional preparatory steps undertaken before a medical procedure, with other medical personnel visible in the background, emphasizing the clinical environment.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment is kept as it fully demonstrates the core action and professional process of a surgeon performing a complete surgical hand and forearm scrub, which is the primary value and expertise shown in the video. It adheres to the 'No-Mistake Rule' as the action starts at the beginning and finishes at the end of the clip without any setup or dead air.
